name: 求生匕首（★） | 深红之网
nameZh: 求生匕首（★） | 深红之网
descriptionEn: This multi-purpose tactical knife features a serrated edge for ripping through coarse material like bone or fiber, plus a sharp gutting hook. The composite material handle is bolted to the blade with hex nuts. It has been painted using a spider web-patterned hydrographic over a red base coat and finished with a semi-gloss topcoat. Be careful where you walk, you never know where the web is spread
descriptionZh: 这把多功能战术匕首，采用骨头或纤维等粗糙材料打造成锯齿刀刃及一个锋利的穿肠钩。复合材料握把上还拴了带有六角螺母的刀片。 这把武器以红色为外表，使用蜘蛛网图案的花纹进行了涂装，完毕后再配上了半光的表层。 留意你的脚步，你永远都不会知道蛛网撒在何处
